deployFrequency.notes: Weeks are oldest-to-newest over last 4 weeks. Week 1 (4 weeks ago) = 0 (possibly pre-history boundary), Week 2 = 175, Week 3 = 222, Week 4 (most recent) = 105. All commits to main via first-parent.

leadTime.notes: Measured as hours from first commit on feature branch (^2 of merge) to merge commit timestamp. All 10 sampled merges were PR merges.

changeFailureRate.notes: git log --grep=revert -i returned 7 matches but all are rollback/checkpoint feature commits (e.g. 'transaction rollback', 'checkpoint and revert system'), not actual code reverts. Zero standard 'Revert "..."' commits found.

dora.mttrNotes: No revert incidents found to measure MTTR from.

prr.runbooksEvidence: No files matching *runbook*, *playbook*, or *ops* found in docs/
prr.onCallEvidence: No pagerduty or opsgenie references found. 'on.call' pattern matched loop.ts and orchestrator engine but as code method names, not on-call tooling.
prr.incidentResponseEvidence: No files matching *incident* or *postmortem* found in docs/
alertingEvidence: docs/internal/monitoring-manifest.json — slack-ops webhook channel defined for all 11 monitors

monitoring.slosEvidence: SLO grep returned 45 files but matches are metric/threshold names in code, not SLO definition documents.
monitoring.alertRulesEvidence: docs/internal/monitoring-manifest.json defines alertChannels per monitor (slack-ops webhook)
monitoring.dashboardsEvidence: No Grafana, Datadog, or other dashboard config files found.
monitoring.monitoringManifestEvidence: docs/internal/monitoring-manifest.json — 11 monitors with UptimeRobot/BetterUptime setup instructions, Slack webhook alerting
monitoring.sentryEvidence: packages/shared/src/sentry.ts — full Sentry Node SDK integration with DSN from env/1Password, PII scrubbing, error capture helpers

logging.evidence: packages/shared/src/logger.ts — pino logger with child loggers, NDJSON to stderr in IPC mode, pino-pretty for debug, BRAINSTORM_LOG_LEVEL env control
